title: 🌍 Who is a woman who’s made an impact on your career? hashtag#IWD26Behind many career milestones, t
content: 🌍 Who is a woman who’s made an impact on your career? hashtag#IWD26Behind many career milestones, there’s often someone who encouraged us, guided us, or inspired us to grow. For me, that woman is my wife, Nanditha KM, who played a pivotal role in helping me take one of the most important decisions in my career journey. Her support, insight, and encouragement have truly made a difference.With International Women’s Day on March 8th, it’s the perfect moment to reflect on the women whose leadership, guidance, and inspiration shape our professional paths.💬 Who is a woman who has made an impact on your career?hashtag#InternationalWomensDay hashtag#IWD2026 hashtag#WomenWhoInspire hashtag#WomenInLeadership

title: Celebrating My Work Anniversary at WellSky Over the past year, I’ve had the opportunity to design, o
content: Celebrating My Work Anniversary at WellSky Over the past year, I’ve had the opportunity to design, optimize, and stabilize critical infrastructure environments.Key contributions included strengthening virtual desktop environments, resolving complex policy-driven access issues, implementing structured OU governance, and enhancing overall system reliability.Beyond execution, this year reinforced core lessons:• Security and architecture must go hand in hand• Precision in configuration prevents operational risk• Ownership drives performance• Calm thinking solves complex problemsThis journey expanded both my technical expertise and strategic mindset.Looking forward to scaling impact even further.hashtag#WorkAnniversary hashtag#Leadership hashtag#Technology hashtag#wellsky

title: 𝐌𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐄𝐒𝐏 𝐌𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐂𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐎𝐧𝐞 𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠. 𝐖𝐞 𝐂𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐀𝐥𝐥 𝐓𝐡𝐫𝐞𝐞ESP
content: 𝐌𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐄𝐒𝐏 𝐌𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐂𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐎𝐧𝐞 𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠. 𝐖𝐞 𝐂𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐀𝐥𝐥 𝐓𝐡𝐫𝐞𝐞ESP make you choose one:• 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐢𝐧𝐟𝐫𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞• 𝐃𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲• 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐨𝐧𝐛𝐨𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠Rarely all three. That’s why I built SkySenders.ai.𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐠𝐨𝐚𝐥: Make sure every email your business sends actually lands in the inbox without headaches.In just 𝟑 𝐜𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐤𝐬, you can:• Buy a domain automatically• Provision a dedicated server with dedicated IP• Configure DNS & SSL automatically• Get SSL-enabled tracking URLs• Push to your favourite cold email toolAll this happens in 𝟏𝟓–𝟐𝟎 𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐮𝐭𝐞𝐬, no VAs, no infra team, no thousands of dollars wasted.Every repetitive step we faced became a system in SkySenders.ai. Because 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐬𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐚𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐬 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐛𝐮𝐢𝐥𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐫𝐮𝐧 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮.𝐒𝐤𝐲𝐬𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐬.𝐚𝐢 = 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐫𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 + 𝐃𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 + 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐎𝐧𝐛𝐨𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠hashtag#EmailDeliverability hashtag#PrivateInfrastructure hashtag#SMTP hashtag#ColdEmail hashtag#EmailMarketing hashtag#SaaS hashtag#Automation hashtag#StartupJourney hashtag#EmailInfrastructure
